title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. violascens
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. violascens, also known as a subspecies of wood hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium vulgatum subsp. violascens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and address various health issues.
